name: Sweet-n-Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup grape or red currant jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, salt, bread crumbs, pepper, egg, oil, onion, chili sauce, milk, and garlic in a large bowl. Form into 40 bite-sized meatballs.
2. Brown the meatballs lightly in oil over medium heat, cooking them covered for 5 minutes on low heat.
3. Drain excess fat from the meatballs.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the chili sauce and grape or red currant jelly until combined.
5. Pour the mixture evenly over the cooked meatballs.
6. Heat the pan with the remaining oil over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally to prevent burning. Cook for 10 to 12 minutes until the sauce thickens, basting the meatballs occasionally.
